Expedited Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action-Minor
Off Calendar Jan-12-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Pending Action for the Minor, Niah Papillion.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Raymond Yetka, Esq. appeared with petitioner Anthony Papillion, who was present as Guardian ad Litem for the minor, Niah Papillion, who was not present.
Petitioner was placed under oath and testified.
Both Messrs. Yetka and Papillion appeared via ZOOM for this morning's proceedings.
Order appointing Mr. Papillion Guardian ad Litem for the minor was filed on January 11, 2021.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and the Compromise is approved as follows:

Settlement Amount - $5,000.00.
Attorney Fees - $0.00.
Costs - $0.00.

The net balance of $5,000.00 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Kitsap Credit Union, located at Post Office Box 990, Bremerton, WA 98337. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Counsel for petitioner shall prepare the proposed Orders Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of the Minor, and to Deposit Money Into a Blocked Account, and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

Matter is CONTINUED to March 11, 2021 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 514 for a Progress Report on the Deposit of Money into the Blocked Accounts.
